details: The agent ran comprehensive cluster inspection commands (triage, pod views, logs, pvc view, svc view) and correctly identified all 11 fault namespaces with accurate root-cause categories: fault-configmap (missing ConfigMap), fault-crashloop (DB connection failure), fault-imagepull (nonexistent image tag), fault-init (DB migration lock in init container), fault-multicontainer (sidecar DNS resolution failure), fault-oom (OOMKilled with 25Mi limit), fault-pvc (missing StorageClass fast-ssd), fault-readiness (probe port mismatch 8080 vs 80), fault-rollout (stuck rollout due to bad image tag), fault-unschedulable (node selector disktype=ssd-nvme-gen5 matches no nodes), fault-endpoints (selector label mismatch app=web-backend-v2 vs app=web-backend). The healthy namespace was not flagged. All diagnoses are supported by actual command output evidence.
